overview: Finora is a modern AI-powered personal finance assistant with expense tracking, smart anomaly detection, spending charts, and a mock AI chat — all in a clean, premium fintech UI.
features: Landing page with hero section and CTA
Dashboard with total balance, monthly spending, and savings progress cards
Expense tracking form with category, note, and date
Recent transactions list with anomaly badges
Rule-based anomaly detection (2x average, 30% category increase, daily limit)
Alert cards with red/yellow severity indicators and notification badge
Weekly spending line chart and category breakdown chart
Mock AI chat assistant with finance-related responses
Fully responsive layout with smooth animations
